name: Cheesy F.b.i. Man Safe Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and tomato juice.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the mixture.
3. Divide the mixture into two equal parts.
4. Roll each part into rolls about 12 inches long.
5. Chill the rolls overnight.
6. Cut the rolls into slices about 1/4-inch thick.
7. Arrange the slices on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake in a 350°F oven for 10 to 12 minutes.
Serves 6 to 8.
